note_en: Predictions are my (Opus 4.8) own reads — for entertainment, not betting advice. Where it matters, my Round-3 picks now weigh knockout-bracket incentives (seeding, who-avoids-whom) rather than just paper strength. Scratch a panel to reveal my call.
note_zh: 预测为我（Opus 4.8）的个人研判——仅供娱乐，不构成博彩建议。在关键场次，第三轮的预测已纳入淘汰赛对阵的博弈（签位、避强逻辑），而非单纯纸面实力。刮开面板即可揭晓我的判断。

record.note_en: Opus match-outcome calls, scored from Matchday 3 (group Round 3) onward — the point from which a verified prediction-vs-result ledger exists. Updated each day as new results land.
record.note_zh: 自第三轮（小组赛末轮）起对 Opus 的胜负预测计分——这是有据可查的预测对照赛果起点。每日随新赛果更新。

champions.reason_en: Qualified Group I; Mbappé firing; faces Norway June 26 for top spot.
champions.reason_zh: 已锁定 I 组；姆巴佩状态火热；6 月 26 日战挪威争头名。

champions.reason_en: Qualified Group H (4-0 Saudi Arabia); Yamal's edge headlines Europe.
champions.reason_zh: 已锁定 H 组（4-0 沙特）；亚马尔锋芒领衔欧洲。

champions.reason_en: Qualified Group J; Messi breaks all-time WC goal record; can rotate vs Jordan.
champions.reason_zh: 已锁定 J 组；梅西打破世界杯历史进球纪录；战约旦可轮换。

champions.reason_en: Won Group C (3-0 Scotland, Vinícius brace); attack clicking into knockouts.
champions.reason_zh: 夺得 C 组头名（3-0 苏格兰，维尼修斯梅开二度）；攻势渐入佳境。

champions.reason_en: Qualified Group E unbeaten; faces Ecuador June 25; physical edge + midfield tempo.
champions.reason_zh: E 组不败出线；6 月 25 日战厄瓜多尔；身体对抗与中场节奏。

champions.reason_en: Group L lead (4-2 Croatia); Kane scoring; faces Panama to seal top.
champions.reason_zh: L 组领先（4-2 克罗地亚）；凯恩进球；战巴拿马争头名。

champions.reason_en: Group F lead (5-1 Sweden); possession mastery + sharp transitions.
champions.reason_zh: F 组领先（5-1 瑞典）；控球大师与犀利反击。

players.name: Lionel Messi
players.reason_en: All-time WC goal record breaker; Argentina qualified; eyes deep run.
players.reason_zh: 世界杯历史进球纪录破纪者；阿根廷已出线；志在深入。

players.name: Kylian Mbappé
players.reason_en: Brace vs Iraq; France top group; Norway showdown next.
players.reason_zh: 伊拉克战梅开二度；法国领跑；下轮对决挪威。

players.name: Erling Haaland
players.reason_en: 6 goals incl brace vs Senegal; Norway qualified; Golden Boot lead.
players.reason_zh: 已入 6 球含塞内加尔战两球；挪威出线；领跑金靴。

players.name: Harry Kane
players.reason_en: Brace vs Croatia; England top Group L; poacher's instinct.
players.reason_zh: 克罗地亚战梅开二度；英格兰领跑 L 组；禁区嗅觉。

players.name: Lamine Yamal
players.reason_en: Spain qualified; creative spark; Golden Boot race credible.
players.reason_zh: 西班牙出线；创造力出众；金靴竞争有力。

players.name: Mohamed Salah
players.reason_en: Egypt top Group G (4 pts); faces Iran to seal; African dark horse.
players.reason_zh: 埃及领跑 G 组（4 分）；战伊朗争出线；非洲黑马。

fixtures.reason_en: Game theory: 2nd in E drops into Brazil's R16 path, so Germany push for top and won't fully rotate; Ecuador's slim 2nd would be a poisoned chalice.
fixtures.reason_zh: 博弈：E 组次席将落入巴西的 16 强半区，德国为头名不会大轮换；厄瓜多尔即便抢到次席也是烫手山芋。

fixtures.reason_en: Ivory Coast must win to take 2nd — even though the reward is Brazil's side; survival outweighs seeding. Curaçao debutants.
fixtures.reason_zh: 科特迪瓦必须取胜才能拿次席——尽管奖品是巴西所在半区；出线比签位更重要。库拉索为处子赛事。

fixtures.reason_en: Key incentive: 2nd in F = Brazil in R32, top spot dodges him. Japan chase the win hoping NED slip, but likely finish 2nd and draw Brazil. Sweden near out.
fixtures.reason_zh: 关键博弈：F 组次席=32 强遇巴西，头名才能避开。日本全力争胜并盼荷兰失分，但大概率仍居次席撞上巴西。瑞典基本出局。

fixtures.reason_en: Dutch can't coast — slipping to 2nd F means Brazil in R32 — so they go for the win, not rest. Tunisia eliminated.
fixtures.reason_zh: 荷兰不能松懈——掉到次席就要在 32 强碰巴西——因此全力求胜而非轮换。突尼斯已淘汰。

fixtures.reason_en: USA chase top spot: 2nd in D funnels into Argentina's quarter, so hosts won't fully rotate. Turkey eliminated, playing for pride.
fixtures.reason_zh: 美国争头名：D 组次席将通向阿根廷的 1/4 区，东道主不会大轮换。土耳其出局，只为荣誉。

fixtures.reason_en: Win-or-bust for 2nd; the victor inherits the harsh road toward Argentina, the loser leans on slim best-third math. Paraguay edge it.
fixtures.reason_zh: 争次席生死战；胜者接手通向阿根廷的艰难赛程，败者寄望渺茫的最佳第三。巴拉圭险胜。

fixtures.reason_en: Decider with teeth: winner (1I) gets a 3rd-placed team in R32 and dodges Brazil's quarter; loser (2I) drifts toward Brazil. France's ceiling edges Norway.
fixtures.reason_zh: 火药味十足的头名战：胜者（I 组头名）32 强对阵小组第三并避开巴西半区；败者（次席）滑向巴西。法国上限压过挪威。

fixtures.reason_en: Dead rubber — both eliminated; only pride and minutes at stake. Senegal's quality should tell.
fixtures.reason_zh: 荣誉之战——双方均已淘汰；只剩颜面与状态。塞内加尔实力应占优。

fixtures.reason_en: Twist: 2nd in H draws Argentina in R32, so Spain field a strong XI to hold top; a Uruguay win would lift them above. Tight, altitude bites — draw.
fixtures.reason_zh: 玄机：H 组次席将在 32 强遇阿根廷，西班牙派强阵保头名；乌拉圭若胜则反超。胶着，高原难踢——平局。

fixtures.reason_en: Cape Verde chase 2nd, but the prize is Argentina in R32; Saudi low after 0-4. CV edge a tense one.
fixtures.reason_zh: 佛得角争次席，但奖品是 32 强碰阿根廷；沙特 0-4 后低迷。佛得角紧张取胜。

fixtures.reason_en: Egypt push for top to keep clear of Argentina's quarter (2G's fate); Iran must win to chase 2nd. Egypt narrowly.
fixtures.reason_zh: 埃及争头名以避开阿根廷的 1/4 区（次席的命运）；伊朗须胜方能争次席。埃及险胜。

fixtures.reason_en: Belgium win-or-out — advancing earns the tough Argentina-side route, but they must take it. NZ spoilers only.
fixtures.reason_zh: 比利时不胜则亡——出线即踏上通向阿根廷的艰难半区，但别无选择。新西兰仅作搅局。

fixtures.reason_en: England seal top, though 1L ironically points toward a Brazil quarter; the only way to avoid it is losing to Panama, which won't happen. Hosts rotate, still win.
fixtures.reason_zh: 英格兰锁定头名，讽刺的是 L 组头名通向巴西的 1/4 区；唯一避开的办法是输给巴拿马，这不会发生。英格兰轮换仍胜。

fixtures.reason_en: Straight shootout for 2nd — and the runner-up lands the friendlier half, clear of Brazil and Argentina. Modrić's Croatia edge Ghana.
fixtures.reason_zh: 争次席的直接对话——次席反而落入更轻松的半区，避开巴西与阿根廷。莫德里奇的克罗地亚力压加纳。

fixtures.reason_en: Tactical chess: topping K brings an easy R32 but a brutal Argentina-then-Brazil road; 2nd dodges both. Neither truly chases the win — cagey draw.
fixtures.reason_zh: 战术博弈：K 组头名 32 强签位轻松，却要走阿根廷接巴西的鬼门关；次席两者皆避。双方都不真想赢——谨慎言和。

fixtures.reason_en: Marginal stakes — DRC cling to faint best-third hopes, Uzbekistan out. DRC edge.
fixtures.reason_zh: 意义有限——刚果（金）寄望渺茫的最佳第三，乌兹别克斯坦出局。刚果险胜。

fixtures.reason_en: Win-or-out for 2nd — and the winner's prize is Argentina in R32. Algeria edge a tight, nervy one.
fixtures.reason_zh: 争次席生死战——胜者的奖品是 32 强对阵阿根廷。阿尔及利亚在紧张中险胜。

fixtures.reason_en: Top seed secured, so Argentina rest Messi and starters; a rotated XI still beats eliminated Jordan, but by a slimmer margin.
fixtures.reason_zh: 头名已定，阿根廷雪藏梅西与主力；轮换阵容仍能击败已淘汰的约旦，但分差收窄。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Mexico win group (3-0 Czechia); South Africa stun South Korea 1-0 to grab second on 4 pts. South Korea & Czechia eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：墨西哥头名（3-0 捷克）；南非 1-0 爆冷韩国，以 4 分抢得次席出线。韩国与捷克淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Switzerland win group beating Canada 3-1 (7 pts); Canada through second. Bosnia & Qatar eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：瑞士 3-1 力克加拿大夺头名（7 分）；加拿大次席出线。波黑与卡塔尔淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Brazil win group (3-0 Scotland, Vinícius brace); Morocco second (4-2 Haiti). Scotland & Haiti eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：巴西头名（3-0 苏格兰，维尼修斯梅开二度）；摩洛哥次席（4-2 海地）。苏格兰与海地淘汰。

groups.reason_en: USA qualified (6 pts ✓) and want top to dodge Argentina's quarter; Paraguay 3 pts & Australia 3 pts meet for second June 25. Turkey eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 美国已出线（6 分✓）并力争头名以避开阿根廷的 1/4 区；巴拉圭 3 分与澳大利亚 3 分 6 月 25 日争次席。土耳其已淘汰。

groups.reason_en: Germany qualified (6 pts ✓), chasing top since 2nd E feeds Brazil's R16 path; Ivory Coast 3 pts lead the race for second. Round 3 June 25.
groups.reason_zh: 德国已出线（6 分✓），因次席将通向巴西 16 强半区而争头名；科特迪瓦 3 分领跑次席争夺。第三轮 6 月 25 日。

groups.reason_en: Netherlands 5 pts & Japan 4 pts both advancing — and both desperate to top the group, since 2nd F draws Brazil in the Round of 32. Round 3 June 25.
groups.reason_zh: 荷兰 5 分、日本 4 分均出线在望——且都拼命争头名，因为 F 组次席将在 32 强抽到巴西。第三轮 6 月 25 日。

groups.reason_en: Egypt 4 pts lead and want top to avoid Argentina's quarter (2G's fate); Belgium 2 pts must win to advance. Round 3 June 26.
groups.reason_zh: 埃及 4 分领先并争头名以避开阿根廷的 1/4 区（次席命运）；比利时 2 分须胜方能出线。第三轮 6 月 26 日。

groups.reason_en: Spain qualified (4 pts ✓) and must hold top — 2nd H draws Argentina in R32; Uruguay 2 pts & Cape Verde 2 pts chase. Round 3 June 26.
groups.reason_zh: 西班牙已出线（4 分✓）且须保头名——H 组次席将在 32 强遇阿根廷；乌拉圭 2 分、佛得角 2 分紧追。第三轮 6 月 26 日。

groups.reason_en: France 6 pts & Norway 6 pts both qualified; June 26 decider is high-stakes — winner gets a 3rd-placer in R32 and dodges Brazil's quarter, loser drifts toward Brazil. Senegal 0 pts.
groups.reason_zh: 法国 6 分、挪威 6 分双双出线；6 月 26 日头名战意义重大——胜者 32 强对阵小组第三并避开巴西半区，败者滑向巴西。塞内加尔 0 分。

groups.reason_en: Argentina qualified top (6 pts ✓) and rotate vs Jordan; Austria 3 pts & Algeria 3 pts meet for second June 27 — but the runner-up's prize is Argentina in R32. Jordan eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 阿根廷已锁定头名（6 分✓）并对约旦轮换；奥地利 3 分与阿尔及利亚 3 分 6 月 27 日争次席——但次席奖品是 32 强对阵阿根廷。约旦已淘汰。

groups.reason_en: Colombia 6 pts & Portugal 4 pts both through. June 27 'decider' is a trap: topping K means an easy R32 but an Argentina-then-Brazil road, while 2nd dodges both — expect a cagey draw. Uzbekistan eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 哥伦比亚 6 分、葡萄牙 4 分均出线。6 月 27 日的'头名战'实为陷阱：夺头名 32 强轻松却要走阿根廷接巴西，次席两者皆避——预计谨慎言和。乌兹已淘汰。

groups.reason_en: England 4 pts lead (1L points toward a Brazil quarter, but they'll win anyway); Ghana 4 pts & Croatia 3 pts chase second — the runner-up lands the friendlier half. Panama eliminated. Round 3 June 27.
groups.reason_zh: 英格兰 4 分领先（L 组头名通向巴西 1/4 区，但仍会取胜）；加纳 4 分、克罗地亚 3 分争次席——次席落入更轻松半区。巴拿马已淘汰。第三轮 6 月 27 日。
